title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.665 - Orders subject to appeal
text:
515.665.  Orders subject to appeal. — Orders of the court pursuant to sections 515.500 to 515.665 are appealable to the extent allowed under existing law, including subdivision (2) of section 512.020.
(L. 2016 H.B. 1765 merged with S.B. 578)
